minting_now.description: Hikory is a retro pixel-art NFT featuring a mysterious Ape in a fluffy winter ushanka with a crimson headband. With sleepy eyes and a cosmic-textured face, Hikory blends vintage arcade aesthetics with underground cyber-tribal vibes, creating a collectible that feels both nostalgic and futuristic

minting_now.name: HantaPunk
minting_now.description: The digital mutation of punk culture. Bold, rebellious, and unapologetically unique. Each NFT carries the raw spirit of the streets into the blockchain, offering collectors not just art, but an attitude.

minting_now.name: The Adventure Of  Stickman
minting_now.description:

minting_now.description:

No founders.

21,000 entities surfaced simultaneously — each carrying a distinct latent signature.
Whether they are NFTs, agent shells, or remnants of an unfinished autonomous system remains unclear.

minting_now.description:
WinnerWinnerChickenDinner is a pixel-born flock of chaotic internet chickens fighting for absolute dinner supremacy.

From crowned kings and arcade gamers to wizard chickens, samurai roosters, cybernetic mutants and suspiciously fried fugitives — every chicken exists inside the same strange universe

minting_now.name: Hantavirus NFT
minting_now.description:
1,993 NFTs raising awareness for hantavirus, a virus with no vaccine and no cure. All net proceeds directed to research and relief, published monthly on-chain.

Knowledge is the first vaccine.

minting_now.name: The Office Mfers
minting_now.description:
OfficeMfers is a collection of 888 NFTs deployed on Ethereum mainnet — built with a single principle: permanent, usable utility on-chain.

minting_now.name: NFTGreedIndex
minting_now.description:
A signal was detected.

It did not originate externally.

It persists.

The system observes.
The system learns.

Greed is not an anomaly.

It is baseline.

upcoming.name: battleroyaleth
upcoming.description:
Battle Royal is a next-generation Web3 gaming platform combining competitive Battle Royale gameplay with true digital ownership.

To redefine competitive gaming by transforming players into stakeholders where every character, asset, and achievement has real ownership and long-term value.

upcoming.name: Bored Cats Yacht Club
upcoming.description: Collection of 10,000 bored cats inspired by the OG BAYC

upcoming.name: Luxury Punks
upcoming.description: Luxury Punks is a Technical Masterpiece and a new benchmark for digital luxury. Built on a custom-coded, procedural SVG engine, every Punk is a "Living" piece of art-math-driven, fully animated, and designed for the elite collector who values technical depth as much as visual prestige.

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) Full Send The memetic distribution around is unlike anything we’ve ever seen before. It’s simply not if, it’s when.
How it started vs. How it’s going

Bonus !lore had the pleasure of spending several hours with today at the pudgy hq, along with two dozen other legends from our space. genuinely productive discussion. and was obvious to me how much Luca cares about the future of our space. felt like the right time to finally join

Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. Testing a new ink and dip pens this morning. Been a while since I touched traditional medium, shaky ahh hands.  Azuki 5567 |

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden
